📖 Our Story

Founded by AHA Team in 2010

AHA Crackers has been a trusted name in Sivakasi since 2010. As a direct manufacturer, we bring you premium quality fireworks at factory-direct prices with no middlemen. From colorful sparklers to stunning aerial displays, our 400+ varieties ensure every celebration becomes truly magical.

We are NEERI certified, guaranteeing eco-friendly crackers that are safe for your family and the environment. With over 25,000 happy customers and 16+ years in the industry, Sri Murugan Crackers is the name families trust year after year.
